calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272995 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272995 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73272995 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -A120 -B8 \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition|relist|CVSG|fee class|fee-class|Third Circuit\" metrics/statpack.md | sed -n '1,420p'\nUV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"fee_class\") or has(\"by_fee_class\") or has(\"fee_classes\"))' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,320p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Case considered closed|considered closed|IFP|in forma pauperis|docketing fee|granted-in-part|petition.*dismiss|dismissed.*petition\" src tests docs .github/prompts metrics/README.md | sed -n '1,320p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":24000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,280p' src/fedcourtsai/pipeline/cert_signals.py
sed -n '1,330p' src/fedcourtsai/pipeline/events.py
sed -n '1,150p' tests/test_historical.py
rg -n "_DENIED_ENTRY|dismiss" tests/test_historical.py tests/test_cert_signals.py tests/test_events.py | sed -n '1,220p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":36000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short --untracked-files=all\ngit diff --stat\ngit diff -- data/cases/scotus/73272995/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260712T174542Z","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)
